zh.Derby, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Barley於1217年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比時，他的父親Sir Robert De Barley22歲，母親Catherine Fitzherbert20歲。他於大約1239年與Joan De Reresby在英國英格蘭越可爾瑟結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1279年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.Derby, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾德比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Barley于1217年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比时，他的父亲Sir Robert De Barley22岁，母亲Catherine Fitzherbert20岁。他于大约1239年与Joan De Reresby在英国英格兰越可爾瑟结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1279年在英国英格兰德比夏爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Barley. Those in Lancashire and Yorkshire are named with Old English bār ‘wild boar’ or bere ‘barley’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. A place of the same name in Hertfordshire has as its first element an unattested Old English byname Be(o)ra (from bera ‘bear’).

English: metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of barley, from Middle English barli, barlich ‘barley’ (Old English bærlic, originally an adjective derivative of bær ‘barley’, a byform of bere).
Americanized form of South German Behrle or of its Swiss German cognates Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Berley .

variants.name: Behrle
meanings: South German (Württemberg): from a pet form of Behr ‘bear’, including from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with Old High German bero ‘bear’.
Altered form of Norwegian Berle: habitational name from a farmstead in the county of Sogn og Fjordane, so named with Old Norse barth ‘rim, edge’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Barley was born in 1217, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert De Barley, was 22 and his mother, Catherine Fitzherbert, was 20. He married Joan De Reresby about 1239, in Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1279, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Barley est né en 1217, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert De Barley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Catherine Fitzherbert, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan De Reresby environ 1239, à Thrybergh, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1279, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Barley 1217 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert De Barley 22 und seine Mutter Catherine Fitzherbert 20. Er hat um 1239 in Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan De Reresby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1279 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Barley è nato il nel 1217 nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert De Barley, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Fitzherbert, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joan De Reresby circa 1239, nel Thrybergh, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1279, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Barley(이)가 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert De Barley(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Fitzherbert(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스리버그h에서 Joan De Reresby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1279년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Barley родился в 1217 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert De Barley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Fitzherbert, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan De Reresby около 1239 г. в местности трибирг, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1279 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
